name: Rioters 2025
short_description: rioters 2025 is a fps online shooter game
detailed_description:
Rioters 2025 its a realistic fps online and offline (AI 16vs16) shooter game.


Features:

- weapon customization:
for now the game contain 6 weapons, but we working to add more soon

- character set customization:
there is different variety of cloth

- Weapon System:
you can shoot behind walls , the bullet damage will reduced depend on the material of the wall

- AI system:
the AI system is very advanced , they can truck by vision and sound

- Game mode:
you can Choose from two factions (police and rioters ) and play in team death match

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Dutch, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
